ddls:
CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the survey was conducted */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the survey */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the survey */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the survey */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the survey */,
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observer who conducted the survey */,
  "sheet_number" INTEGER /* Sheet number used for recording survey data */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used during the survey */,
  "survey_type" TEXT /* Type of survey (e.g., roving, stationary) */,
  "data_entry_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the survey data was entered into the system */,
  "data_entry_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who entered the survey data */,
  "survey_status" TEXT /* Status of the survey (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_observer_id FOREIGN KEY ("observer_id") REFERENCES observers ("observer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the location */,
  "habitat_type" TEXT /* Type of habitat at the location */,
  "last_survey_date" TEXT /* Date of the last survey conducted at this location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observers" (
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observer */,
  "observer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the observer */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the observer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the observer (e.g., researcher, volunteer) */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* Experience level of the observer */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the observer joined the organization */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the observer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bird species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the bird species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bird species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species */,
  "average_lifespan" INTEGER /* Average lifespan of the species */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Diet of the species */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Preferred habitat of the species */,
  "migratory_pattern" TEXT /* Migratory pattern of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disturbances" (
  "disturbance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of disturbance */,
  "source_code" TEXT /* Code for the source of the disturbance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disturbance */,
  "response_code" TEXT /* Code for the response of birds to the disturbance */,
  "response_description" TEXT /* Description of the bird's response */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the disturbance */,
  "impact_level" TEXT /* Impact level of the disturbance on bird behavior */,
  "mitigation_measures" TEXT /* Measures taken to mitigate the disturbance */,
  "data_entry_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the disturbance was entered into the system */,
  "data_entry_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who entered the disturbance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disturbance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "destinations" (
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each destination */,
  "destination_code" TEXT /* Code for the destination */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the destination */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the destination */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the destination */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the destination */,
  "habitat_type" TEXT /* Type of habitat at the destination */,
  "data_entry_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the destination was entered into the system */,
  "data_entry_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who entered the destination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("destination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "landuses" (
  "landuse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each land use or crop type */,
  "landuse_croptype" TEXT /* Name of the land use or crop type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the land use or crop type */,
  "land_area" TEXT /* Area of the land use */,
  "vegetation_type" TEXT /* Type of vegetation */,
  "data_entry_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the land use was entered into the system */,
  "data_entry_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who entered the land use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("landuse_id")
)
